scripts.dev:infra: bash -lc 'docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.infra.yml -f docker/docker-compose.dev-ports.yml up -d && pm2 startOrReload pm2.config.cjs --only sentris-frontend-0,sentris-backend-0,sentris-worker-0 --time'
scripts.dev:stack: bun run dev:infra && pm2 logs sentris-frontend-0
scripts.dev:stack:stop: bash -lc 'pm2 delete sentris-frontend-0 sentris-backend-0 sentris-worker-0 || true && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.infra.yml -f docker/docker-compose.dev-ports.yml down'
scripts.test: rm -rf worker/dist && bun test packages && bun test backend && bun test worker && bun test e2e-tests && bun --cwd=frontend run test
scripts.test:e2e: bash -lc 'SENTRIS_INSTANCE=${SENTRIS_INSTANCE:-$(./scripts/active-instance.sh get)} RUN_E2E=true bun test --force-exit e2e-tests'
scripts.test:e2e:core: bash -lc 'SENTRIS_INSTANCE=${SENTRIS_INSTANCE:-$(./scripts/active-instance.sh get)} RUN_E2E=true bun test --force-exit e2e-tests/core'
scripts.test:e2e:pipeline: bash -lc 'SENTRIS_INSTANCE=${SENTRIS_INSTANCE:-$(./scripts/active-instance.sh get)} RUN_E2E=true bun test --force-exit e2e-tests/pipeline'
scripts.test:e2e:cloud: bash -lc 'SENTRIS_INSTANCE=${SENTRIS_INSTANCE:-$(./scripts/active-instance.sh get)} RUN_E2E=true RUN_CLOUD_E2E=true bun test --force-exit e2e-tests/cloud'
scripts.template-library:verify: bun run template-library:check && bun --cwd backend test src/templates/__tests__/seed-templates.spec.ts && bun test scripts/__tests__/template-library-live-audit-utils.test.ts
scripts.security-components:verify: bun run security-components:check && bun --cwd worker test src/components/security/ && bun --cwd backend test src/components/__tests__/security-components-api.spec.ts && bun test scripts/__tests__/security-component-audit-utils.test.ts && bun scripts/security-component-docs-check.ts
scripts.lint: bun run lint:frontend && bun run lint:backend && bun run lint:worker
scripts.lint:fix: bun run lint:frontend --fix && bun run lint:backend --fix && bun run lint:worker --fix
